cards.name: Rhun
cards.quote: Rhun is a far shore of smoke and mounted dust, where distant thunder gathers.

cards.name: AmonLhaw
cards.quote: AmonLhaw watches the vale with a stillness that can outlast kingdoms.

cards.name: ButhOvaisa
cards.quote: ButhOvaisa lies far from easy roads, where the silence of the land feels deliberate.

cards.name: DeadMarshes
cards.quote: The reeds about DeadMarshes whisper like witnesses who would rather not be named.

cards.name: Olbamarl
cards.quote: Olbamarl keeps its old hush by the water, and the reeds there seem to remember names.

cards.name: OrdugaAivaisa
cards.quote: OrdugaAivaisa feels like a watch-post left standing after the rest of a kingdom was taken away.

cards.name: Tol Buruth
cards.quote: Tol Buruth drifts on the Sea of RhÃƒÂ»n like a rumor that has learned to sail.

cards.name: AmonHen
cards.quote: AmonHen crowns the river with a stern eye, as if watching for the same doom that once came south.

cards.name: Ashkiri
cards.quote: Ashkiri is ash-bright and watchful, as if the land had learned to glare back at the sun.

cards.name: Carvarad
cards.quote: Carvarad holds itself like a fortress of old resolve, half-buried in memory and rain.

cards.name: Elgaer
cards.quote: Elgaer is ringed with a quiet that makes every hoofbeat sound like trespass.

cards.name: Ilanin
cards.quote: Ilanin is quiet under the east wind, and its stillness feels like a warning held back.

cards.name: Laorki
cards.quote: Laorki keeps its own counsel, where the earth is old and the paths are few.

cards.name: LarHuz
cards.quote: LarHuz endures like an old work of Dwarven hands, sure, severe, and unbending.

cards.name: Neburcha
cards.quote: Neburcha shelters a stillness that feels earned, as though hardship had taken root and stayed.

cards.name: Ovatharac
cards.quote: Ovatharac keeps the feel of a place where power once walked and still leaves its footprints.

cards.name: Raider Hold
cards.quote: At Raider Hold, the water carries old news, and none can tell which tidings are friendly.

cards.name: Riavod
cards.quote: Riavod is crossed by old rumors and older streams, and neither has lost its way.

cards.name: Shrel-Kain
cards.quote: Shrel-Kain broods in silence, as if the dark there had learned to wait.

cards.name: Sturlurtsa Khand
cards.quote: Sturlurtsa Khand keeps the hard memory of a road where riders once vanished into dust.
